div.h1: Physical vs Logical Call Stack in Async Code
div.p: The profiler sees disjoint physical stacks; the logical flow spans multiple polls

div.h2: Why Traditional Profilers Fail on Async Code

ol.li: Discontinuous stacks: Each poll is a fresh stack — no link to previous polls
Lost spawn context: When handle_request was spawned, the spawner's stack is gone
Time gaps invisible: The 50ms I/O wait doesn't appear in any sample
Thread migration: Task may resume on different thread — TLS-based tracking fails

div.p: Track task identity across polls using:

ul.li: Logical stack reconstruction from state machine

div.p: Another yield for parse completion Task migrated to Thread 3 (work-stealing)
Key Insight: The logical stack shows who called whom, even across await boundaries. Profiler must track:
